gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: Ashan Chat
welcome.subtitle: What can I do for you?
welcome.description: Start from a clear lane. You can send a task directly, or pick a working mode so Ashan can get into the right rhythm faster.
welcome.askQuestionsPrompt: Help me break this task into executable steps and start with the first one.
welcome.creativeTasksPrompt: This task needs continuous execution. Please break it into phases and keep moving it forward with clear outputs.
welcome.brainstormingDesc: Split a complex problem into parallel tracks
welcome.brainstormingPrompt: Break this problem into several directions and give me options with tradeoffs for each.
welcome.quickFixDesc: Find the root cause, then patch with minimal change
welcome.quickFixPrompt: Please locate the root cause first, then apply the smallest viable fix directly.
welcome.tipModel: Quick switch models from the lower-left controls
welcome.tipSkill: Attach skills and files before sending
welcome.tipAgent: Route the message to another agent when needed

composer.modelPickerTitle: Quick switch the active chat model
composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another agent
composer.skillPickerTitle: Choose a skill for this message
composer.skillDirective: For this reply, prioritize skill "{{skillName}}" (Skill ID: {{skillId}}).
